text:
Created attachment 198866
patch file

* Update to 3.0.0
* Add devel/dash.el, devel/graphql.el and devel/treepy.el to dependency.
* Switch from PLIST_FILES to pkg-plist.
* Fix portlint warning.

This bug report depends on bug #232888 and bug #232889. So please commit them before committing this one.
